name: Bug report
about: Report a repo bug, bad automation behavior, or incorrect fetch/validation path
title: "[bug] "

---

## Summary

Describe the bug clearly.

## Affected File

List the file path or skill id.

## Expected Behavior

Describe what should happen.

## Actual Behavior

Describe what happens now.

## Reproduction

Provide the command, input, or workflow that reproduces it.
